arts.ttl: Liverpool set to have lunchtime meeting today on transfer – Face-to-face chat will even cover outgoing January deal
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold’s deal at Liverpool expires in 2025 and his future could be away from Anfield after this season. Over the past few weeks, claims from Spain have stated Real Madrid want him, but they haven’t decided whether to make an approach in January or wait until next summer.
